programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 4
programme.desc: Cooking at the end of a very long jetty, Jay competes with professional chef Tony Howell.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Tinned and Frozen Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants are given the freedom to cook anything but with only tinned and frozen produce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 2
programme.desc: Andrew and Kumar face a "Fix that Dish" Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 5
programme.desc: In tonight's MasterClass, Brendan Pratt cooks slow roasted lamb shoulder with croquettes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Invention Test 3
programme.desc: This week's "Super Invention Test" is Spanish-themed.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 3
programme.desc: Jay, Dani and Ellie faced a Pressure Test set by Dan Hong, head chef at Ms. G's restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 5
programme.desc: In an immunity challenge, Danielle faces off against Nordic chef Thorsten Schmidt

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 4
programme.desc: Teams are asked to prepare six dishes with only one team member cooking at any one time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 3
programme.desc: Shannon and Arena put themselves forward as the two weakest performers from the Red Team.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 6
programme.desc: Two lucky chefs fly to Malaysia for a private class with Rick Stein.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Qantas Fine Dining Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants pair up and are asked to prepare one of eight courses of Neil Perry's QANTAS First Class menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 4
programme.desc: Craig, Michael, Shannon and Rachel face a Heston Blumenthal creation: burger with chips and a milkshake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 6
programme.desc: Kate competes against Darren Purchese, Melbourne's answer to Adriano Zumbo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 5
programme.desc: In the sustainable food challenge, contestants prepare a lunch service at the Greenhouse "pop up" restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 5
programme.desc: The losing team face a three-round elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 7
programme.desc: The judges reveal the secret to cooking the perfect spotted dick.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 3
programme.desc: This week's Korean-inspired Invention Box challenge is set by Korean-American top chef David Chang.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 5
programme.desc: Danielle, Michael, Adam and Ellie face a Pressure Test set by George's mother Mary Calombaris.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 7
programme.desc: Hayden takes on pastry chef Vincent Gadan in the immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Westfield Team Challenge
programme.desc: Teams are asked to prepare simple dishes that have specific dietary requirements.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 7
programme.desc: The Red Team face an "In-the-round" challenge with two stages.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 8
programme.desc: Mary Calombaris, George's mother, shares the secret to preparing the perfect moussaka.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Moran Farm Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants are tasked with preparing lunch for 200 hungry farmers and their families.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 6
programme.desc: Ellie, Danielle and Peter are set a tough test by chef Matthew Kemp.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 8
programme.desc: The fierce battle for the immunity pin sees Christine Manfield as a guest judge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Two Briefs Team Challenge
programme.desc: Teams are faced with their first catering jobs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Blind Taste Test
programme.desc: The Blue Team are faced with two challenges: a Taste Test and an Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 9
programme.desc: As a reward, contestants Ellie and Alana are given another culinary lesson by the best chefs in New Zealand.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 4
programme.desc: In a Sunday Challenge, the contestants are faced with a Mystery Box and an Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 7
programme.desc: Mat, Billy and Hayden face off in a Pressure Test

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 9
programme.desc: Chef Alessandro Pavoni challenges Dani to make a tray of sibas, squid soup, and tomato powder for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Marco Pierre White Challenge
programme.desc: Billy returns to the house after Mat's removal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 8
programme.desc: Michael, Hayden, Kate and Peter face a three-round elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 10
programme.desc: Luke Nguyen conducts a special master class about Vietnamese cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - New York Boroughs Challenge
programme.desc: In their first challenge in New York, contestants are each sent to a different part of the city.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - United Nations Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants have three hours to prepare intricate dishes for 300 hundred guests at the United Nations.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 10
programme.desc: Renowned Italian chef Cesare Casella challenges Ellie to create his Pasta Amatriciana.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - New York Team Challenge
programme.desc: The teams have 3.5 hours to race from Times Square to the Four Seasons Restaurant to each cook one course..

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 9
programme.desc: Sun, Dani, Hayden and Billy are tasked with cooking traditional soul food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 11
programme.desc: The chefs attend a master class at the Marriott Marquis on their last day in New York.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Dalai Lama Challenge
programme.desc: The Masterchef contestants must cook for the one and only Dalai Lama!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 9
programme.desc: Billy and Kate have two hours to recreate Katrina Kanetani's 'Autumn' dessert plate.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 11
programme.desc: Famous MasterChef winner Eamon Sullivan challenges Dani to prepare his Chocolate Delice dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Qantas First Lounge Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants take over 90 minutes of service at the QANTAS First Lounge kitchen at Sydney Airport.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 10
programme.desc: Hayden, Kate and Michael have 90 minutes to cook a dish demonstrating skills acquired during the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 12
programme.desc: The final five finalists are challenged to make mushroom turnip ravioli.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 5
programme.desc: In a Mystery Box Challenge, the top 5 pick each other's ingredients as per the Secret Santa method.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Cooking for Loved Ones Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants cook ten servings of a single dish of their choosing for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 12
programme.desc: Guest chef Teage Ezard challenges Michael to a three course meal cook-off in the last immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Worst Nightmare Challenge
programme.desc: The top 5 are surprised by George in the early morning as he shows up at the house with three guest chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 12
programme.desc: Dani chooses to use her immunity pin, sending Alana into the Elimination Challenge against Ellie.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.
